/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -pie -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_langpack.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_langpack.dir/test_langpack_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_langpack.dir/test_langpack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_langpack.dir/__/src/utils/LangPack.cpp.o -o test_langpack  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Test.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Multimedia.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2
